payload.answer: Extracted three durable, atomic design takeaways about source evidence, memory card granularity/traceability, and separation of semantic index recall from authoritative application database lifecycle/conflict ownership.
citations: AI memory systems need durable source evidence.
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable.
A semantic index can improve recall, but the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state.

entity_resolution.reason: Input provides general design principles rather than a specific user, project, or existing entity to resolve.

payload.intent: extract durable source takeaways from article text into atomic memory cards

memory_cards.statement: AI memory systems need durable source evidence.
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable.
A semantic index can improve recall, but the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state.

details: Created atomic memory cards with source-traceable statements.
No conflicts or entity merges detected.
Preserved semantic index as recall-supporting rather than lifecycle-authoritative.
